segment_token_reuse.read: Values near 1.0 mean each compressed-group segment has almost one selected row per token. In that case, a group-owned segment CTA has little same-token K reuse and cannot naturally recover the query-major KxH by HxD MFMA schedule.

boundary_route_fanin.read: Actual LightningIndexer top-k fan-in is counted per compressed group from the TorchTitan-shaped boundary tensors. Prefix stats are the structured route used by earlier synthetic dKV probes at the same top-k; matching totals do not imply matching topology.

read: A group segment is one unique compressed group inside a token x selected tile. The segment count is the number of selected rows that would be reduced before one dKV write. High pair_share_ge16 supports warp/block segmented reduction; many count<=1 segments would mean the route is too sparse to coalesce profitably.

scope: Tile-local compressed-group segment lengths for dKV grouped reducers.
